info.title: AnhTester Book Management API
info.description: A comprehensive API for managing books, users, files, categories, and addresses, provided by [AnhTester](https://anhtester.com). The API is designed to be easy to use and supports a wide range of operations for book management, user management, file management, category management, and address management.             UI page to run this API: [book.anhtester.com](https://book.anhtester.com)

tags.name: Authentication Management
tags.description: Manage user authentication, including creation and refresh of JWT tokens.

tags.name: User Management
tags.description: Manage user accounts, including creating, updating, and deleting user information.

tags.name: File Management
tags.description: Support file operations such as upload, download, and file management.

tags.name: Book Management
tags.description: Manage book information, including creating, updating, and retrieving book lists.

tags.name: Category Management
tags.description: Manage book categories, including creating and updating category lists.

tags.name: Address Management
tags.description: Manage address information in Vietnam, including creation, retrieval, and updates.

tags.name: Promotion Management
tags.description: Manage promotions, update information, and provide promotion details.

post.description: Refresh token to get new access token.

get.description: Get a paginated list of users with optional filters and sorting
Get detailed information of a specific user by ID

patch.description: Update user information by ID and revoke old refresh tokens

delete.description: Delete a user by ID and remove all related refresh tokens

get.description: Query list of books (pagination, filtering, sorting)
Get all address divisions of Vietnam
Get all wards for the selected division
